apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

apps.title: Word Solitaire
apps.summary:
Word Solitaire is a clever blend of card strategy and word discovery. It's not your usual word game — here, you'll match ideas, uncover connections, and build meaning chains to clear the board. Relax, think, and play your way through hundreds of challenging levels that twist the classic solitaire formula into something totally fresh.

A New Kind of Word Challenge
What happens when solitaire meets the art of finding hidden connections?
Each level starts with a few cards on the table and a full deck waiting to be revealed.
Draw cards one by one, find the right categories, and place matching words in their proper spots. Just like solitaire, smart planning matters — one misplaced card can change everything.

How to Play:
- Tap to draw cards from the deck.
- Place category cards first to create a foundation.
- Add all related word cards to complete the group.
- Clear all stacks to win the level.

It's simple to learn but deeply satisfying to master.

Why You'll Enjoy It:
- A relaxing mix of solitaire logic and word connection puzzles
- Hundreds of handcrafted levels full of clever links and surprises
- No timers, no rush — play at your own pace
- Smooth design and rewarding progression
- Ideal for fans of word, logic, and card games

Play in Your Language
Word Solitaire is now available in multiple languages — switch the game to the one that feels most natural to you:
🇫🇷 French · 🇩🇪 German · 🇪🇸 Spanish · 🇷🇺 Russian · 🇵🇹 Portuguese · 🇹🇷 Turkish · 🇯🇵 Japanese · 🇰🇷 Korean
One game, endless languages — for players all around the world.

Train Your Brain, One Word at a Time
Every match you make sharpens your reasoning and vocabulary. Think outside the box, spot the hidden connection, and feel that "aha" moment with every correct pairing.

What Players Are Saying
"Brilliant combination of cards and words. Totally addictive."
"Perfect balance of thinking and relaxing — my new favorite puzzle."
"So satisfying when you find the hidden link."

Whether you love word games, card games, or brain teasers, Word Solitaire delivers the best of all worlds. It's clever, calm, and endlessly replayable.

apps.title: CrossGrams - PvP Puzzle Game
apps.summary:
CrossGrams is a fresh, competitive take on crossword puzzles where two players solve the board together — one move at a time. Smart strategy, quick thinking, and a strong vocabulary are your keys to victory!

CrossGrams is a turn-based multiplayer crossword game inspired by Scandinavian-style puzzles, with clues inside the grid and occasional picture clues for extra fun and variety.

How it works:
- Each turn, you receive 5 random letters
- Score points by placing correct letters, completing words, and using bonus tiles
- Strategic choices matter — sometimes saving a powerful letter for later can win the match!

Game Features:
- Unique Cooperative Crossword Gameplay – Complete the puzzle together while competing for the highest score
- Leagues – Win matches, earn cups, and climb through competitive leagues to prove your crossword mastery
- Duel Journey – Face increasingly challenging opponents, defeat powerful bosses, and claim a big prize at the end
- Achievements – Complete challenges, show off your progress, and unlock bragging rights
- Bonus Tiles & Scoring Combos – Big plays mean big rewards

CrossGrams blends the best of crossword puzzles, word strategy games, and competitive multiplayer into one addictive experience. Fans of crossword games, Scrabble-style word play, and turn-based strategy will feel right at home — and quickly get hooked.

Play smart. Play fast. Play CrossGrams.

apps.title: Cool Lady
apps.summary:
Cool Lady is an easy-to-pick-up puzzle adventure game. Navigate through rooms filled with traps and mechanisms, and help the character safely reach the exit.

Move Pins, Avoid Traps
Each room is packed with items and monsters. Move pins to change the terrain, use props wisely to avoid danger, and plan a safe path to the exit. The controls are simple, but the later levels will challenge your observation and imagination.

Freely Switch Character Skins
Multiple male and female character skins are available in the game and can be unlocked as you progress. Change your character’s outfit anytime and enjoy a fresh look every time you play.

Earn Rewards Through Tasks
Complete daily missions, medal leagues, and other activities to collect coins and cash rewards. Once you accumulate enough, you can withdraw them to your personal account. Play a few rounds in your spare time and you might earn a pleasant little bonus along the way.

apps.title: Pair Match Solitaire
apps.summary:
A Cozy Logic Adventure Awaits

Step into the relaxing world of Pair Match Solitaire, where matching feels natural and every level brings something new. There are no timers pushing you—just a smooth, satisfying experience focused on finding the right connections and enjoying the process.

Gameplay Highlights

Explore a Giant Encyclopedia
Discover an incredible variety of objects across the game. From modern fashion and delicious foods to unique plants and everyday items, each level introduces something different to recognize, sort, and enjoy.
Rich & Diverse Sorting Experiences
This isn’t just simple matching. Each stage challenges you to think in new ways, using different perspectives to group items. The gameplay stays fresh as new ideas and patterns continue to appear.
The Ultimate Sorting Challenge
Put your logic skills to the test by spotting subtle connections between items. Match by style, color, theme, or category, and uncover the many ways everything fits together.
Tons of Unique Levels
With a large collection of levels and a wide range of themes, the experience never feels repetitive. From clean, modern city visuals to soft and dreamlike natural scenes, each stage offers a distinct look and feel.
Smooth and Satisfying Flow
Enjoy responsive controls and fluid animations that make every move feel effortless. The game is designed to be easy to pick up and relaxing to play at your own pace.

Perfect for Players Who

Enjoy matching, sorting, and logic-based puzzle games
Like discovering a wide variety of objects and organizing them
Prefer games with lots of content and constantly changing themes
Want a relaxing, polished experience that stays engaging over time

apps.title: Dream Raiders 2: Wilds
apps.summary:
Ready to begin a relaxing idle adventure in another world?
Wait—what?! You’ve been reincarnated as an adorable pet?! Become a mysterious (and irresistibly fluffy) hero in a whimsical fantasy realm, and start your cozy adventure across Dreamland. Set up camp, soak up the sunlight, share drinks, and enjoy a sizzling barbecue with friends—what could be better?

【Effortless Idling, Endless Rewards】
Wake up from a sweet dream—huh? Why is the warehouse overflowing?! Stay tucked under the covers and still earn tons of resources! Level up easily and enjoy shared experience growth across your team. Who says you can’t get stronger while lying down?

【A Laid-back Life in Another World】
Gather resources, craft items, and build your very own home in another world. Sip a little wine, unwind after a long day, and enjoy the slow rhythm of fantasy life!

【Diverse Maps, Relaxed Adventures】
Do you love green meadows where the breeze gently brushes your face? Or would you rather wander along golden beaches, feeling the call of the waves? Maybe the unknown calls to you—mysterious caves, molten cores, or floating islands high above the clouds? Leave real-world worries behind and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Dreamland!

【Stress-free Social Fun at the Camp】
As the campfire crackles and the scent of grilled meat fills the air, lay out your picnic blanket and gather your friends! Try out some exotic delicacies from another world—ever wondered what dragon tail might taste like?

【Hands-Free Combat Anytime, Anywhere】
No complicated controls—just jump into battle with a single tap! Your team fights automatically with dazzling effects, letting you enjoy smooth and exciting combat wherever you are. Sit back, relax, and watch the show!

【Adorable Pets, Endless Variety】
Meet the Dreamies—your cute, fluffy, and loyal friends of all shapes and sizes! Perfect for traveling, exploring, and collecting resources, each Dreamie has unique abilities that boost your power and productivity. Who could resist building a whole nest of adorable companions?

apps.title: Arrows Puzzle Relax
apps.summary:
🌟 Why choose "Arrows Puzzle Relax"?
Mind Awakening: Challenge logic, planning and spatial perception in the interlacing of arrows - keep your brain active with clever arrow-pulling puzzles.

Immersive decompression: no time limit, no countdown pressure. Develop strategies calmly and enjoy pure thinking in a quiet atmosphere.

Minimalism: The screen design eliminates redundancy and minimizes visual interference, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the art of puzzle solving.

Take Control: Whether it's a quick 5-minute break or a long commute, it fits your pace perfectly.


🌟 Game highlights: intellectual game, tranquility of mind
Craftsmanship levels: Thousands of hand-polished levels, say goodbye to boring random generation - each level is a unique puzzle-solving experience.

Smooth curve: difficulty gradually increases. From easy to get started to deep brain-burning, it accurately matches your thinking growth, making it challenging but not frustrating.

Pure aesthetics: Simple yet high-end design returns the visual focus to the puzzle itself - focusing on solving the puzzle rather than tedious operations.

Zero-pressure experience: You can think over and over again and try multiple times. There is no step penalty, only the exploration of the optimal path.

Turn on at any time: supports offline play, no matter where you are, your private mental gym is always online.

🌟 Core gameplay: minimalist control, in-depth strategy
Core task: Reasonably plan the order of arrow shooting. Make sure every arrow leaves the field smoothly without any collision.

Intuitive operation: Tap the screen to pull the arrow. The operation is extremely simple, but the depth of the strategy behind it is fascinating.

Multidimensional thinking: Who moves first? Who is the queen? How to get around obstacles? Every simple click is a test of forward planning.

Perfect pass: complete the level with zero collisions and zero mistakes, and attack the logic peak of higher difficulty.

🌟 Intimate function: your puzzle solving companion
Smart Tips: Encountering a bottleneck? Use elimination props to eliminate them directly, which is a shortcut to your victory.

apps.title: BagMaster Isekai – Bag Battle
apps.summary:
ATTENTION ADVENTURERS

One minute you’re just chilling, playing your favorite game, and then next suddenly you’re IN the game! Welcome to the world of isekai, where you, the player, get to experience being transported to a whole new world. Here you’ll be helping the local piggies defeat waves of enemies in this delightful turn-based RPG. Collect and merge items in your bag to create awesome weapons, explore dungeons and castles, battle bosses, and test your strategy skills: on your mark, get set, oink!

SURVIVAL OF THE SMARTEST

In this roguelike RPG, you’ll have a chance before each wave of enemies to try and max out your weapons by merging them and using synergy to create bigger, better, and badder equipment. You’ll also have a chance to pick which buff you want to add at the end of the battle, allowing you to create and build on a strategy. The fun never ends in this role playing isekai game as you also get to explore new territories and grow your character!

Fun features:

- Bag it up – A key mechanic of this turn-based role playing game is your backpack. Use it to both store your gear as well as merge individual pieces to create stronger weapons and equipment.

- Waves on waves of enemies – as all good tactical strategy games go, this one too features tons of waves of increasingly strong enemies and bosses for you to test your ideas and might out on. That also gives you a chance to change tactics if you feel like your survival is at risk! Between battles you can make little adjustments that will add up over time and help you win… if you’re smart.

- Turn based strategy – that’s right, all those little buffs and weapons merges will either help or hinder you, and there’s no way of knowing if you picked the right battle plan until you’re facing down a horde of bosses. That’s the true joy of this type of roguelike RPG game!

- Roguelike goodness – As you wipe out your enemies and fight for survival, have fun exploring the various levels and learning more about your new world. Navigate through the maze of monsters as you level up and get to know your piggy overlords. The roguelike mechanics will make this isekai role playing game feel familiar for fans of the genre, while also being accessible to newer players.

- Fun in the sun – despite all the strategizing and merging and fighting you’ll be doing, this game is still about having fun after all! Build out your character, explore new realms, and of course, enjoy the great graphics and sound effects. With short battle waves you can always find time to squeeze in a fight or two!

THE OINKIEST TACTICAL STRATEGY GAME

Come one, come all, and let yourselves be transported to an exciting new world thanks to this roguelike role playing game. Use your magical bag to create the ultimate weapons as you seek survival by making the right choices each round. Let the turn-based roguelike mechanics lead the way as you battle your way through this dungeon crawler tactical strategy game and prove your might.

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use

apps.title: Merge Cruise: Mystery Puzzle
apps.summary:
🚢 Embark on a thrilling merging, puzzling, and matching adventure with Merge Cruise: Mystery Puzzle!
Set sail on a captivating journey across exotic islands, where every merge unlocks hidden treasures and reveals intriguing mysteries waiting to be solved.

Merge Cruise: Mystery Puzzle! offers a unique blend of merging gameplay and adventurous quests, perfect for players of all ages. Dive into immersive landscapes, explore ancient ruins, and encounter fascinating characters along the way.

With stunning visuals, captivating soundtracks, and addictive gameplay mechanics, Merge Cruise delivers an unforgettable experience that will keep you engaged for hours on end. Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or an adventure seeker, there's something for everyone in Merge Cruise!

🔎 Game Features:
🧩 Merge and Match: Generate and merge items on the board to complete tasks and earn cash. Discover a variety of items to create and merge.
🛠️ Renovate and Decorate: Use your hard-earned cash to renovate your cruise ship. Clean, fix, build, and decorate your way through each chapter, transforming your ship from run-down to luxurious.
📚 Engaging Storyline: Immerse yourself in a rich narrative filled with humor, drama, and mystery. Interact with a cast of colorful characters, each with their own unique personalities and secrets.
🎮 Unique Gameplay Modes: Choose from three gameplay modes, each offering a different experience. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned puzzler, there's a mode for you.
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Diverse Cast of Characters: Interact with a spectrum of characters, each bringing their unique story and secrets to the fold.
🌎 Themes of Legacy and Community: Explore narratives of legacy, identity, and belonging, all woven into the fabric of a compelling mystery.
🆕 Regular Updates: With new chapters, items, and events added regularly, there's always something new to discover in Merge Cruise.

Set sail on a puzzle adventure like no other! Start merging, matching, and adventuring your way to victory today! Download Merge Cruise now and discover the excitement that awaits you on the high seas!

apps.title: Goddess Protocol: Zero
apps.summary:
You are a traveler from Earth, now serving as an Investigator for the "Ethereal Investigation Bureau" (EIB). Your mission: to seek out and recruit War Maidens with diverse talents—the spirited martial arts prodigy, the vengeful archer sworn to slay demons, the weaver of dreams who manipulates reality, and the phantom hunter prowling the night with magic bullets.

Based in the gritty, chaotic backstreets, you will build your own faction. Recruit War Maidens, organize Demon-Hunting squads, explore the Deep Domains, and engage in turf wars. As you hunt Abyssal monsters and crush your rivals, you will grow in power until you are ready to decide the fate of the world.

Will you become a Demon Lord to rule this world, or a Hero to save it? The choice is yours. No matter the path you take, your War Maidens will follow you to the very end of the world.

This is a story of life, dreams, responsibility, and love. Your journey begins now.

【Strategic Cards, 3D Real-Time Combat】
Form an investigation squad with your War Maidens to hunt down supernatural criminals, explore the Deep Domains, and uncover the secrets of Eldritch powers. Strategize with five distinct classes: Warrior, Assassin, Support, Mage, and Knight. Join forces with your girls to dominate the Arena and challenge the apex rulers of the underworld.

【Urban Exploration, High-Octane Hack & Slash】
A lost city has been discovered within a massive underground void, teeming with hidden treasures and lurking foes. Lead your squad through abandoned districts at breakneck speed. Experience the thrill of "mowing down" hordes of monsters—even rookie Investigators can easily send enemies flying in this exhilarating combat experience!

【Defend Source Energy, Rich Tactical Challenges】
The Deep Domains are fraught with peril, yet they hold the precious Source Energy. Assemble an escort team to protect transport vehicles, expanding your strength along the way to repel waves of supernatural raiders. Under your command, the War Maidens will stand firm and fulfill their mission with unwavering faith.

【Phantom Opera, Co-op Heart Purification】
A mysterious psychic lurking in the Opera House can manifest the darkness within people's hearts—the Opera Phantoms. Defeating these phantoms purifies the negative emotions accumulated from long-term psychic erosion. As an Investigator, you must regularly bring the girls here for purification. Team up with other players to take down Phantoms and share the grand theater rewards!

【Luxury Living, Relax & Bond】
A spacious, luxurious private apartment awaits you in the city, featuring rich indoor and outdoor scenes that you can switch at will. The War Maidens are already waiting for you in their rooms! After a long day of adventuring, be sure to return to the apartment for some "mysterious interactions." We won't spoil the surprise—discover the rest for yourself!

"Even across time and space, we await our reunion with you, Investigator."

apps.title: Dead by Extraction
apps.summary:
The sun set long ago in the world you knew, leaving behind only the ink-stained silence of the discarded. Welcome to the grey between life and loss—a sketchbook of crumbling brick and forgotten dust where the architecture is as hungry as the ghosts. You are a Scavenger, a flickering candle in a forest of grey, rummaging through the ribcages of dead buildings to reclaim the scrap of the past. But beware: every hallway is a throat waiting to swallow you whole, and every shadow has a name.
Escape the ruins... or become part of them.

THE LOOP: SEARCH. FIGHT. ESCAPE.
The rules of the ruin are simple but deadly. Enter the zone, fill your pockets with relic scrap, and find the extraction point before the clock strikes midnight.
• Scavenge the Shadows: Rummage through the rot of schools, hospitals, and houses to find the materials you need.
• Banish the Residents: Use ancient exorcist tools to fight back the ghouls that haunt the halls.
• The Final Run: If you don't reach the exit in time, the ruins will claim you—and everything you’ve gathered—forever.

CRAFT YOUR CURSE: Roguelike Combat
No two descents into the dark are the same. As you battle through the corridors, the ghosts you defeat grant you flickering memories of power.
• Triple-Threat Evolution: Choose between three twisted power-ups in the heat of battle to evolve your survival.
• Synergize to Survive: Will you focus on blinding light, serrated steel, or protective charms? Your build is the only thing between you and a permanent stay in the ward.

ARSENAL OF THE EXORCIST
With over 50 unique Talismanic Tools to collect, your playstyle is yours to define. From rusted ritual blades to spectral lanterns, every tool features a deep Perk Tree.

SHELTER OF SCRAP: Camp Operation
You aren't the only one trapped in the grey. Deep within the ruins, you’ll find "The Broken"—hostages of the haunts who are waiting for a savior.
• Rescue & Rebuild: Bring survivors back to your camp to unlock specialized shops and powerful services.
• Management of the Macabre: Your camp is your only sanctuary. Use your extracted loot to fortify your home and prepare for the next night.

GAME FEATURES:
• Gothic Hand-Drawn Art: A beautiful eerie world inspired by classic lite-horror sketches.
• High-Stakes Extraction: The thrill of "Search-Fight-Extract" compressed into bite-sized, casual sessions.
• Urban Exploration (Urbex): Explore 8+ distinct environments, from the Hollow High School to the Echoing Offices.
• Endless Variety: Dozens of heroes to unbind and hundreds of weapon/perk combinations to master.

THE RUINS ARE CALLING. WILL YOU ANSWER, OR WILL YOU FADE?
apps.description:
The sun set long ago in the world you knew, leaving behind only the ink-stained silence of the discarded. Welcome to the grey between life and loss—a sketchbook of crumbling brick and forgotten dust where the architecture is as hungry as the ghosts. You are a Scavenger, a flickering candle in a forest of grey, rummaging through the ribcages of dead buildings to reclaim the scrap of the past. But beware: every hallway is a throat waiting to swallow you whole, and every shadow has a name.
Escape the ruins... or become part of them.
 
THE LOOP: SEARCH. FIGHT. ESCAPE.
The rules of the ruin are simple but deadly. Enter the zone, fill your pockets with relic scrap, and find the extraction point before the clock strikes midnight.
•	Scavenge the Shadows: Rummage through the rot of schools, hospitals, and houses to find the materials you need.
•	Banish the Residents: Use ancient exorcist tools to fight back the ghouls that haunt the halls.
•	The Final Run: If you don't reach the exit in time, the ruins will claim you—and everything you’ve gathered—forever.

CRAFT YOUR CURSE: Roguelike Combat
No two descents into the dark are the same. As you battle through the corridors, the ghosts you defeat grant you flickering memories of power.
•	Triple-Threat Evolution: Choose between three twisted power-ups in the heat of battle to evolve your survival.
•	Synergize to Survive: Will you focus on blinding light, serrated steel, or protective charms? Your build is the only thing between you and a permanent stay in the ward.

ARSENAL OF THE EXORCIST
With over 50 unique Talismanic Tools to collect, your playstyle is yours to define. From rusted ritual blades to spectral lanterns, every tool features a deep Perk Tree.

SHELTER OF SCRAP: Camp Operation
You aren't the only one trapped in the grey. Deep within the ruins, you’ll find "The Broken"—hostages of the haunts who are waiting for a savior.
•	Rescue & Rebuild: Bring survivors back to your camp to unlock specialized shops and powerful services.
•	Management of the Macabre: Your camp is your only sanctuary. Use your extracted loot to fortify your home and prepare for the next night.
 
GAME FEATURES:
•	Gothic Hand-Drawn Art: A beautiful eerie world inspired by classic lite-horror sketches.
•	High-Stakes Extraction: The thrill of "Search-Fight-Extract" compressed into bite-sized, casual sessions.
•	Urban Exploration (Urbex): Explore 8+ distinct environments, from the Hollow High School to the Echoing Offices.
•	Endless Variety: Dozens of heroes to unbind and hundreds of weapon/perk combinations to master.
 
THE RUINS ARE CALLING. WILL YOU ANSWER, OR WILL YOU FADE?

apps.title: Backflip Mania
apps.summary:
🤸‍♂️ Welcome to 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮!
Ready to defy gravity and perform the most insane stunts ever? Welcome to 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮, the ultimate destination for every parkour enthusiast looking for an extreme challenge. Put your physics skills to the test, jump off high platforms, and land the perfect flip today!

🌟 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀
𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲 𝗘𝗻𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: Flip through amazing world locations, from urban rooftops and city gym areas to tropical islands and snowy mountains.

𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗣𝗵𝘆𝘀𝗶𝗰𝘀: Experience a true-to-life 3D physics engine where you must master the Spring tension and Rotation axis to survive. Every jump from the Trampoline bed feels uniquely satisfying.

𝗠𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴: It’s not just about the flip—you must hit the Landing zone on your feet or use a Bail out technique to avoid a crash.

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀: Unlock Airtime mastery and new action animations as you conquer harder levels. Use Progression drills to move from basic stunts to pro-level mastery.

⚡ 𝗚𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗙𝗲𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀
𝗘𝘅𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗲 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗲𝘀: Face hundreds of levels where you'll need a perfect Take-off phase and Spotting technique. Execute everything from a Front tuck flip, Back tuck flip, and Side tuck flip to advanced moves like the Wall flip, Webster flip, and Gainer flip.

𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲: Take the action to the water! Practice your Crash dive flip, Front drop flip, or Back drop flip in special pool and sea environments.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗨𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗧𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗟𝗶𝘀𝘁: Push your parkour logic to the limit with complex moves. Can you land a Barani flip, Miller flip, Half-in half-out flip, or the legendary Full-in full-out flip?

𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗻𝘁𝘀: Experiment with technical moves like the Cody flip, Kaboom flip, Swivel hips flip, Pullover flip, or a Turntable flip. For those who love twists, try the Arabian flip, Cork flip, or a Double full twist flip.

𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻: Find the Center point of your jump to pull off a Back pike flip, Side pike flip, or a clean Back layout flip. Whether it's a Seat drop flip, Knee drop flip, or Back handspring flip, your timing is everything.

Offline Fun: Enjoy the adrenaline of a Roundoff flip, Cradle flip, or a B-kick flip anywhere, anytime.

🏆 Do you have what it takes to be the lead?
From the safety of the Frame padding to the peak of a skyscraper, show off your Full twist flip, Standing back flip, and Aerial flip skills. Play 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮 and start your extreme jump journey today!
